original_image_tags: Small map of coastal region in Devon, England. Shows towns including Ilfracombe, Woolacombe, Cullompton, Exeter, Sidmouth, Exmouth, Torquay, and Paignton. Water bodies are depicted with horizontal lines.

elements.description: A hand-drawn map of the Devon coast, showing locations including Ilfracombe, Woolacombe, Cullompton, Exeter, Sidmouth, Teignmouth, Torquay, and Paignton, with coastal features and rivers depicted.

judge.reason: The descriptions list different town names (e.g., Cullompton vs. Teignmouth) and one mentions 'coastal features and rivers' while the other does not, indicating a factual contradiction on specific locations depicted in the visual content.
